mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_item, do_id, expect_delivery_day, plan_delivery_day, event_source, version, current_valid, delflag, cre_time, creator, remark, ex_relation, current_cycle, current_cycle_point, reliability
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result (id, order_id, order_item, do_id, expect_delivery_day, plan_delivery_day, event_source, version, current_valid, delflag, cre_time, creator, remark, ex_relation, current_cycle, current_cycle_point, reliability) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expectDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, #{planDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, #{eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{currentValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentCyclePoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result
id,
order_id,
order_item,
do_id,
expect_delivery_day,
plan_delivery_day,
event_source,
version,
current_valid,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
remark,
ex_relation,
current_cycle,
current_cycle_point,
reliability,

#{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expect_delivery_day = #{record.expectDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE},
plan_delivery_day = #{record.planDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE},
event_source = #{record.eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
current_valid = #{record.currentValid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ex_relation = #{record.exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
current_cycle = #{record.currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
current_cycle_point = #{record.currentCyclePoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reliability = #{record.reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expect_delivery_day = #{record.expectDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, plan_delivery_day = #{record.planDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, event_source = #{record.eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, current_valid = #{record.currentValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ex_relation = #{record.exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, current_cycle = #{record.currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_cycle_point = #{record.currentCyclePoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reliability = #{record.reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expect_delivery_day = #{expectDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE},
plan_delivery_day = #{planDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE},
event_source = #{eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
current_valid = #{currentValid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ex_relation = #{exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
current_cycle = #{currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
current_cycle_point = #{currentCyclePoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reliability = #{reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_delivery_plan_result set order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expect_delivery_day = #{expectDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, plan_delivery_day = #{planDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, event_source = #{eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, current_valid = #{currentValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ex_relation = #{exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, current_cycle = #{currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_cycle_point = #{currentCyclePoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reliability = #{reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
